attack_chain.description: Threat actors obtained compromised credentials and used them to access Medibank's environment, including the Amazon Redshift platform.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Medibank ransomware incident in October 2022, which reportedly involved access to the firm's Redshift platform

attack_chain.description: Attackers accessed Medibank's Redshift data warehouse containing personal and health claims data for all customers.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: hackers accessed all of its customers' personal data and a large amount of health claims data

evidence_chunks.quote: hackers accessed all of its customers' personal data and a large amount of health claims data
hackers accessed all of its customers' personal data and a large amount of health claims data

attack_chain.description: Attackers exfiltrated approximately 200GB of personal and health claims data from the Redshift platform.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: providing a sample of 100 stolen files out of an alleged 200GB of data stolen during the attack

evidence_chunks.quote: providing a sample of 100 stolen files out of an alleged 200GB of data stolen during the attack
providing a sample of 100 stolen files out of an alleged 200GB of data stolen during the attack

attack_chain.description: Ransomware gang contacted Medibank to extort the company using stolen data as leverage.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the ransomware gang made contact to extort the company

initial_access_vector: Compromised credentials used to access Medibank's Amazon Redshift data warehouse platform (reportedly exposed due to public access / lax default settings).
